posts.text:
I keep hearing about scammers using WhatsApp or this platform, impersonating me and charging for investment advice and stock tips. Etc.  

I don’t have any paid services.  I don’t contact people on WhatsApp and give stock tips. 

Please report and block imposters.
posts.author: BambroughKevin
